article.title: Comparative efficacy and safety of three fixed-ratio combination products in type 2 diabetes: A network meta-analysis.
article.authors: Wang X, Qin J, Liu Y
article.abstract: To systematically evaluate and compare the efficacy and safety of three fixed-ratio combination products-insulin degludec/liraglutide (IDegLira), insulin glargine/lixisenatide (iGlarLixi), and insulin degludec/insulin aspart (IDegAsp)-in patients with type 2 diabetes.
